positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical arrangement of exotic tropical flora and delicate jungle vines. The style should be a harmonious blend of Art Nouveau illustration and contemporary geometric vector art. Use a restricted, luminous palette of deep emerald green, sapphire blue, and glowing gold accents against a stark midnight black background. The composition must be perfectly centered and striking, utilizing strong, graphic silhouettes and extremely high contrast. The design should appear like a seamless, luxurious emblem, suitable for apparel printing. Clean lines, minimalist yet lush, photorealistic illustration quality.
negative: blurry, low resolution, worst quality, noise, grain, watermark, signature, text, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, artifacts, jpeg artifacts, cropped, out of frame, gradient, messy, clutter
